overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a character walking through rain-soaked urban environments. The journey progresses from a covered commercial walkway through narrow graffiti-covered alleys to an open plaza with neon signs and prominent NCPD graffiti, featuring heavy rain and atmospheric neon lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with food stalls and benches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway, passing white benches and food stalls on either side

notable_agents.action: person sitting on white concrete bench against the wall
child walking ahead in the distance wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure providing shelter from rain
tall red concrete wall with large floral and abstract murals
modern white benches with people resting
food vendor stall with bright red and white striped awning

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered commercial walkway with wet tiled flooring reflecting the ambient light. White benches line the left side where NPCs sit, while food stalls with bright signage occupy the right. The environment is sheltered from the heavy rain by an overhead concrete structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with graffiti-covered walls and street food cart

events.description: exits covered walkway into narrower open alley with graffiti-covered walls and exposed to rain

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past a food cart with colorful umbrella, moving deeper into the alley

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at green food cart with red and green umbrella
person in plaid shirt walking past the food cart

entered.detail: massive wall painting of a skull with red background covering the right wall
green food cart with red and green umbrella serving customers
stacks of cardboard boxes and debris piled against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the covered walkway to a narrower alleyway dominated by a massive skull mural on the right wall. A food cart with a colorful umbrella sits on the right where NPCs gather, while cardboard boxes and debris line the left side. The area is now exposed to the heavy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley opening up with palm trees and industrial brick buildings

events.description: passing under brighter artificial lights and steam vents as the alley opens up

agents.ego_description: walking through the widening alley passing a child running ahead and approaching a more open area

notable_agents.action: child in dark clothing running ahead of the camera
adult walking in the opposite direction wearing a vest

entered.detail: tall palm trees visible in the distance against the dark sky
red brick building with green window frames and metal security grates
metal walkway bridge connecting buildings above the street

segments.scene_description: The alley gradually opens up with palm trees becoming visible in the distance against the night sky. The character passes a child running ahead and walks alongside a brick building with green-trimmed windows on the left. Steam vents and industrial overhead walkways become prominent as the environment transitions to a more open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with NCPD graffiti building and bright neon advertisements

events.description: emerges into wide open plaza with NCPD graffiti building and bright neon billboards
camera turns slightly left to navigate around pedestrians and parked vehicle

agents.ego_description: entering the open plaza and looking around at the neon signs and NCPD building while navigating around obstacles

notable_agents.action: parked car with headlights on sitting in the plaza
person in red jacket crossing the street in front of the camera

entered.detail: large industrial building with NCPD HOP graffiti and concrete stairs
tall building facade with bright white digital advertisements and neon lighting
dark colored car parked in the center of the plaza with headlights illuminated

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide open plaza dominated by a building with large NCPD graffiti and concrete stairs. Bright neon billboards illuminate the rainy scene, casting colorful reflections on the wet ground. A parked car sits in the center of the plaza while pedestrians cross the open space, and the camera navigates around them.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered commercial corridor into a rain-drenched urban plaza. It begins within a covered walkway where wet tiled floors reflect the glow of food stalls and white benches, before transitioning into a narrower, exposed alleyway dominated by a massive skull mural and a colorful food cart. As the camera moves forward, the alley gradually opens up, passing a running child and brick buildings with green-trimmed windows while steam vents and industrial walkways emerge under the night sky. The scene finally expands into a wide open plaza, where the camera navigates around pedestrians and a parked car beneath bright neon billboards and a building marked with prominent NCPD graffiti.
